pin_definitions.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.
Blocking FET gate driver output. Connect B_GATE to GATE of the external NFET.
Blocking FET fast pulldown switch drive. Connect DRV to the GATE of external pulldown switch.
Power input and supply voltage of the device.
Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold.
Input for setting the programmable overvoltage protection threshold (TPS26630 and TPS26631 Only).
Input for setting the programmable output power limiting threshold (TPS26632, TPS26633, TPS26635, TPS26636 and TPS26637 Only).
A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate.
A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload and short-circuit current limit.
Mode selection pin for overload fault response.
Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.
Fault event indicator. This pin is an open drain output.
Active High. A high indicates PGTH has crossed the V(PGTHR) threshold and the internal FET is enhanced.
Connect PowerPAD integrated circuit package to GND plane for heat sinking.

logical_pins.name: IN
logical_pins.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

logical_pins.name: B_GATE
logical_pins.description: Blocking FET gate driver output. Connect B_GATE to GATE of the external NFET.

logical_pins.name: DRV
logical_pins.description: Blocking FET fast pulldown switch drive. Connect DRV to the GATE of external pulldown switch.

logical_pins.name: IN_SYS
logical_pins.description: Power input and supply voltage of the device. Short to IN if blocking FET is not used.

logical_pins.name: UVLO
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold. Connect to GND for default.

logical_pins.name: OVP
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the programmable overvoltage protection threshold. Connect to GND for default.

logical_pins.name: PLIM
logical_pins.description: Input for setting the programmable output power limiting threshold. Connect to GND if not used.

logical_pins.name: dVdT
logical_pins.description: A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate.

logical_pins.name: ILIM
logical_pins.description: A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload and short-circuit current limit.

logical_pins.name: MODE
logical_pins.description: Mode selection pin for overload fault response.

logical_pins.name: SHDN
logical_pins.description: Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.

logical_pins.name: IMON
logical_pins.description: Analog current monitor output. If unused, leave this pin floating.

logical_pins.name: FLT
logical_pins.description: Fault event indicator. Open drain output. If unused, leave floating or connect to GND.

logical_pins.name: PGOOD
logical_pins.description: Active High power good indicator. If unused, connect to GND or leave floating.

logical_pins.name: PowerPAD
logical_pins.description: Connect PowerPAD integrated circuit package to GND plane for heat sinking.

14.description: Fault event indicator. Open drain output. If unused, leave floating or connect to GND.

16.description: Active High power good indicator. If unused, connect to GND or leave floating.
